name: Control Plane
description: Task-ledger-first control-plane helpers for safer agent execution

storeDir.description: Relative or absolute path for control-plane state. Defaults to .openclaw-control-plane under the workspace.

defaultListLimit.description: Default limit used by task_ledger list when the caller does not provide one.

fileCheckpointingEnabled.description: Source-grounded alias from claw-code. When set, it becomes the default enable/disable switch for lifecycle checkpoint automation unless more specific automation settings override it.

enabled.description: Master switch for lifecycle automation hooks and review reminders.

checkpointOnReset.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks before /new or /reset clears context.

checkpointOnCompaction.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks before compaction.

checkpointOnFailure.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks after failed/interrupted runs.

checkpointOnLongRun.description: Automatically checkpoint active tasks after long runs.

longRunMs.description: Run-duration threshold for automatic long-run checkpoints.

dedupeWindowMs.description: Skip repeating the same automatic checkpoint summary within this time window.

agentScopedFallback.description: If no session-bound tasks match, allow automation to fall back to agent-scoped tasks.

enabled.description: Attach review reminder checkpoints to tasks when structured outputs indicate follow-up.
